The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 This is Fate S2 E38
programme.desc: The story revolves around the two sisters of Pragya, from Kumkum Bhagya. Her sisters are Preeta and Shristhi who discover the existence of their mother Sarla and sister Pragya, after their father’s death. The sisters try to unite with their mother and sister.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.sub-title: S01 : E386 Trinayani S1 E386
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Wildly through the desert
programme.desc: BMW and the German racing team X-Raid take part in the Dakar Rally with a transformed Mini Countryman. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a 6-wheel off-road monster. And: the Kia Sportage feels both at home in the rocky terrain of Sicily and the city.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 Sportscars for the Masses
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang has been an icon for decades. What makes this car so special? In addition: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo is half as expensive as a Porsche 911, but its power is on par with the German flagship. And: the 7th generation Volkswagen Golf GTI and R.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Enduro Park Hechlingen
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Unique Models and Million-Sellers
programme.desc: Aston Martin usually triggers thoughts of James Bond and expensive sports cars. But the British luxury brand also offers sedans like the 1976 Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake. An Aston fan turned his into to a station wagon.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E53 Royal Cars
programme.desc: The Bentley S2 Continental Flying Spur, a drivers' car with Rolls Royce genes. In addition: Joseph Stalin's ZIS 110, a Soviet reverse-engineered Packard Super Eight. And: the Rolls Royce Silver Wraith, the British luxury vehicle for the Belgian king.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E68 Fresh Air Experience
programme.desc: Smart offers its iconic city car with a convertible option. The Mini cabriolet is bigger and provides room for four people. When it comes to roadster feeling, the Mazda MX-5 is on top of the list. We took a closer look at these three open-top contenders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Offroad Dinosaurs
programme.desc: For more than 60 years the Land Rover Defender fought its way through the roughest terrain all over the world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz G-Series, the German off-road all-purpose tool. And: the Russian icon Lada Niva was re-named as Taiga.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E184 Big in US
programme.desc: They are big, heavy and embody the American way of driving: luxury SUVs like the Cadillac Escalade, classic pick-up trucks like the iconic Ford F-150 or Uber pick-ups like the Dodge RAM.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E167 Porsche GT3 Streetracer
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Fastest Cars in the World
programme.desc: Speed has always been one of the most important criteria when it comes to owning or driving a car. We show you our top 10 list of the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 The Ugliest Cars
programme.desc: The world of automobiles is also full of contrasts. There are fast and slow, beautiful and less beautiful models. We present our top 10 ugliest cars in the world.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 The Ten Slowest Cars
programme.desc: Cars are often defined by their speed, but we chose to decelerate things and take a look at our top 10 selection of the most sluggish cars.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E26 Flip through a cola truck
programme.desc: Stunt man Dominik Kowalski is an expert for falls, drops and body stunts. Today, everything will be different as he is supposed to be the stunt car driver. His objective is to do a flip through a cola truck.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Jump'n Crash
programme.desc: In this episode of Stunt Heroes, it's all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch. He drives down a ramp and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other while several petrol barrels explode at the same time.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E157 Four Seatbelts for a Halleluja
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 The Most Beautiful Convertibles
programme.desc: Convertibles are not only popular in summer and when the weather is nice. We present our top 10 most beautiful convertibles.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Most Expensive Production Cars
programme.desc: Everyone knows that vehicles made by hand or in small numbers can be extremely expensive. But that can also be true for production vehicles. Here are our top 10 most expensive production cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E195 From Dusk till Dawn
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E140 Porsche 911 Targa
programme.desc: Porsche decided to introduce an updated model of their iconic 911 Targa. In addition: it's pure open-top joy to drive Maserati's Gran Cabrio MC. And: the BMW M6 convertible in Munich.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E77 Audi R8 GT vs. Jaguar XKR
programme.desc: The ultimate competition: Aston Martin Virage vs. Jaguar XKR vs. Audi's R8 GT vs. Mercedes SLS. Also: Artega claims that their GT is a 'Porsche killer'. Is that so? And: Formula One champion Sebastian Vettel takes the Infinity FX50 to the test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E59 German Race Car Classics
programme.desc: We present to you historic image and film documents from the Porsche 550 RS Spyder. And: how the Audi Quattro shocked its competitors with its driving dynamics.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 Arabella Classics
programme.desc: The Arabella Classics is one of the most exclusive classic car rallies in Europe. We took part in a rare BMW 502. Plus: The Lamborghini Diablo GT and the Volkswagen Bus T2 Westfalia are put to the test.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Pony Cars - the American Way of Drive
programme.desc: In 1964, the first Ford Mustang saw the light of day, and its sales surpassed all expectations. Following this iconic car's 50th anniversary we explored if the contemporary Mustang was still the benchmark in its class, compared to its competitors.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Moment of Force
programme.desc: Dennis Rostek races the Mathilda Racing GT-R1 at the Nürburgring Nordschleife. Also: the two sons of racing legend Hans-Joachim Stuck take the BMW 550d to the test track. And: could the Volkswagen Golf 7 be a suitable Bond car?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E160 Road Stars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E121 On Patrol with the Dubai Police Supercars
programme.desc: The Dubai police's fleet of patrol cars includes a Chevrolet Camaro, a Lamborghini Aventador, a Bentley GT, a Ferrari FF and more. For the first time ever, their Special Cars Unit allowed a TV crew a glimpse behind the curtain.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Episode 19
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nuerburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E103 Asian Bestsellers
programme.desc: The Lexus IS-F, Nissan's GTR and Juke R and the Infiniti FX 50 are rather exotic models. Not only the futuristic design but also the performance of these Asian power packs made European car manufacturers quiver in their boots.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E141 Jaguar RS
programme.desc: Jaguar succeeded in finding new confidence and challenging their competitors with models like the XF-RS, XK-RS and F-Type. We took a look at the iconic British brand's latest developments.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Episode 20
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 V8 Bangers
programme.desc: The V8 engine: strong, bursting with power and blessed with a sound that gives you goose bumps. The British TVR 5000's engine comes from the Ford Mustang, and the car's overall low weight promises an exhilarating driving experience.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 AMC Cobra Pacer
programme.desc: The rare AMC Pacer featured in the movie Wayne's World is a real eye catcher. This car caught the attention of famous German music manager Andreas Laesker.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E54 Hybrids
programme.desc: Some people claim that hybrid cars are neither fish nor fowl. Audi's reaction was the A3 e-tron. The all-electric BMW i3 went a step further, offering a range extender. Also: the Mitsubishi Outlander, the first plug-in hybrid SUV in the world.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Rally Year 1972 - A Ford success story
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which was run from 1970 to 1972. Car manufacturers such as Porsche, Renault, Opel and Ford took part in this competition, with Ford having an exceptionally successful year in 1972.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 German Touring Car Championship 1992
programme.desc: The Deutsche Tourenwagen Meisterschaft was one of the most important racing series in German motorsports. It was difficult, tough and well-known for its die-hard battles between the international competitors. We present the highlights of the 1992 race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Bizzarrini 5300 GT
programme.desc: Giotto Bizzarrini was the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, but after arguments with his employer he left Ferrari early. To get back at Ferrari, Bizzarrini decided to create his own sports car: the Bizzarrini GT 5300.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E58 Luxurious coupes with 12 cylinders
programme.desc: The 1973 Jaguar XJC's V12 engine purrs like a kitten and growls like a wild cat. In addition: the high-tech luxury coupe BMW 850. And: in the 1960s the Ferrari 250 GTE wrote racing history. We took this sportster to the test track.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 German Rallye Championship 1983
programme.desc: Since its premiere in 1970 the Deutsche Rallye Meisterschaft has been one of the most popular motorsports series. In the 1983 competition Opel's Manta, Kadett and Ascona sports models celebrated exceptional successes.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Audi Quattro - The new Dimension, 1985
programme.desc: In 1985 Audi made their impressive mark in motorsports with the Quattro. With its 4x4 drive this model impressed the audience and shocked the competition alike and ushered in a new era in rally sports.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Henry Ford
programme.desc: In the early 20th century, automotive pioneer Henry Ford revolutionized the world of car manufacturing with the foundation of the Ford Motor Company and his introduction of the assembly line technique in his factory and the iconic Model T.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Rally Sport 1983
programme.desc: In 1983 Audi introduced the Quattro 4x4 drive to the rally world, adding a new dimension to rally racing. The races became tougher and more brutal. The strain on drivers, vehicles and mechanics alike was extremely intense.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Rallye Sport 1984
programme.desc: In Europe and Africa in 1984, the rally veterans and drifting artists, Hannu Mikkola, Walter Roehrl, Bjoern Waldegaard, Marku Alen and the rally amazon, Michele Mouton, fought fiercly for the World Championship title.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 50 Years Jaguar E-Type
programme.desc: A legend celebrates its 50th anniversary. In 1961 the Jaguar E-Type was shown for the first time at the Geneva International Motor Show.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Mercedes 300 SL Gullwing
programme.desc: The Mercedes 300SL might be the most exciting sports car of the post-war era. It was even named sports car of the century. Hans Kleissl owns one of the world's leading repair and restoration shops for SL models.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E193 Open Air Feeling
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Melkus RS 1000
programme.desc: The Melkus RS 1000 is considered the Ferrari of the East. The extremely flat two-seater with its mid-engine and gullwing doors was the only real sports car ever built in the GDR and is hardly known outside the former country's borders.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Innovations
programme.desc: Duel of the city runabouts: the Audi A1 Quattro versus the Renault Clio RS. Also: the Morgan Plus 8 roadster with its combination of retro design and modern tech. And: the Swiss think-tank Rinspeed's vision of tomorrow's big city traffic.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Crazy Rides
programme.desc: In 2006, Peraves presented their MonoTracer, a cabin motorcycle with immense power and an electric drive option. Also: the three-wheeler Carver One combines motorcycle and car specs. And: two unusual rides, a Mini hot rod and the Reliant Rialto.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 Sporty All Wheelers
programme.desc: At the Monza Rally Show, motorsport superstars compete against each other on the legendary Formula 1 race track. Also: the powerful and sporty Mercedes GLE Coupé is the answer to the BMW X6. And: the facelift of the Nissan Juke.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Mercedes ML 63 AMG
programme.desc: We put the Porsche Cayenne Turbo S and the Mercedes ML 63 AMG to the test. Also: the final round of the truck trial race at the Camp4fun at the Nürburgring in Germany. And: General Motors' new luxury SUV, the Cadillac SRX.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 BMW motorcycle production
programme.desc: Sheer Driving Pleasure: That’s how BMW advertises not only its cars, but its motorcycles as well. For more than 40 years, these 2-wheelers have stood for maximum comfort, quality, and safety.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Mechatronics
programme.desc: Pleidelsheim, near Stuttgart. The Mechatronik company specialises in classics from Mercedes. Since 1997, engineers, electricians and mechanics has dedicated itself to the restoration and refinement of classic models.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Walter Röhrl
programme.desc: One cannot talk about rally sports without mentioning the name Walter Röhrl. From an early age, Röhrl showed his talent in rally sports and won the European, World and other international rally championships several times in his career.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: In 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini set himself the goal to build the best sports cars in the world, a bold move, being located only a few kilometers from Ferrari.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 All-Wheel Vans
programme.desc: With the 2 Series Gran Tourer all-wheel van, like, for example, the 220 xDrive, BMW wants families to experience the joy of driving. The Seat Alhambra offers a practical sliding door and a lot of space in the back. Also: the luxurious V-Class by Mercedes.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Wildly through the desert
programme.desc: BMW and the German racing team X-Raid take part in the Dakar Rally with a transformed Mini Countryman. Also: the Mercedes G63 AMG 6x6, a 6-wheel off-road monster. And: the Kia Sportage feels both at home in the rocky terrain of Sicily and the city.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 Sportscars for the Masses
programme.desc: The Ford Mustang has been an icon for decades. What makes this car so special? In addition: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo is half as expensive as a Porsche 911, but its power is on par with the German flagship. And: the 7th generation Volkswagen Golf GTI and R.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Enduro Park Hechlingen
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Unique Models and Million-Sellers
programme.desc: Aston Martin usually triggers thoughts of James Bond and expensive sports cars. But the British luxury brand also offers sedans like the 1976 Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake. An Aston fan turned his into to a station wagon.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E53 Royal Cars
programme.desc: The Bentley S2 Continental Flying Spur, a drivers' car with Rolls Royce genes. In addition: Joseph Stalin's ZIS 110, a Soviet reverse-engineered Packard Super Eight. And: the Rolls Royce Silver Wraith, the British luxury vehicle for the Belgian king.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 Goodwood Revival, Part 1
programme.desc: The Name 'Goodwood' gives fans of historic racing cars goose bumps. It's the biggest and most beloved event for fast vintage cars. We show you the most spectacular races from the Goodwood Circuit.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ron Williams and his Cadillac
programme.desc: The 1952 Cadillac Fleetwood is also known as the American Rolls-Royce, because it’s the car of celebrities, presidents, millionaires and mafia bosses. One owner of this rare classic car is German-American actor and entertainer Ron Williams.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E40 Handmade roadsters
programme.desc: Wiesmann, Roding, Artega, these names represent small automotive manufacturers where hand-crafted vehicles are produced in low volumes. We took a look at some of these exclusive sports cars.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 The battle - cheap vs. Expensive
programme.desc: The Dacia Logan MCV is a very affordable station wagon. We made a cheap vs. expensive comparison between the Logan and the Golf Variant, the supermini cars Audi A1 quattro and Renault Clio R.S. and the Korean SUVs SsangYong Rexton and Hyundai Santa Fe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E182 High Voltage
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E134 Extravagance Times Four
programme.desc: Porsche presented their Panamera 4 S with a 6-cylinder instead of a V8. Jaguar reinvented itself with the XJ, offering modern technology in a fancy dress. And: the first all-electric luxury sedan that redefined electric mobility, Tesla's Model S.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Bike Crash
programme.desc: This time the team deals with motorbike stunts: high jumps, risky drops and dangerous crashes in the company's backyard. Stunt coordinator Domi requires his specialists to be in top shape and extremely focused.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 The Ambulance
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Domi’s latest idea for the Stunt Heroes team involves an old ambulance that is prepared so that the stuntman can jump right through the ambulance with his car.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Episode 20
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E159 Luxury 2.0
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E120 When Sports Meets Indulgence
programme.desc: Luxury class grand tourers with four doors. Porsche introduced their Panamera as a Plugin Hybrid or equipped with new turbo engines. BMW responded with their M6 Gran Coupe. German engineering at its finest.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E81 Porsche Cayman R
programme.desc: Not only Porsche fans will like the sportiest Cayman model. Also: with the Juke-R, Nissan combined a GT-R sports car and a crossover. And: the BMW G-Power is the fastest station wagon on this planet.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Triumph Speed Triple Carbon
programme.desc: Suzuki's all-rounder flagship, the V-Strom, underwent a rejuvenation treatment. Will the new V-Strom 650 be able to surpass its versatile predecessors? Also: does the use of carbon make sense in the manufacturing of motorcycles? And: a bike tour on the Deutsche Alpenstraße, the German Alpine Road, in the footsteps of Bavaria's fairy tale king Ludwig II.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Episode 17
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E59 German Race Car Classics
programme.desc: We present to you historic image and film documents from the Porsche 550 RS Spyder. And: how the Audi Quattro shocked its competitors with its driving dynamics.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 Arabella Classics
programme.desc: The Arabella Classics is one of the most exclusive classic car rallies in Europe. We took part in a rare BMW 502. Plus: The Lamborghini Diablo GT and the Volkswagen Bus T2 Westfalia are put to the test.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Pony Cars - the American Way of Drive
programme.desc: In 1964, the first Ford Mustang saw the light of day, and its sales surpassed all expectations. Following this iconic car's 50th anniversary we explored if the contemporary Mustang was still the benchmark in its class, compared to its competitors.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Moment of Force
programme.desc: Dennis Rostek races the Mathilda Racing GT-R1 at the Nürburgring Nordschleife. Also: the two sons of racing legend Hans-Joachim Stuck take the BMW 550d to the test track. And: could the Volkswagen Golf 7 be a suitable Bond car?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E160 Road Stars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E121 On Patrol with the Dubai Police Supercars
programme.desc: The Dubai police's fleet of patrol cars includes a Chevrolet Camaro, a Lamborghini Aventador, a Bentley GT, a Ferrari FF and more. For the first time ever, their Special Cars Unit allowed a TV crew a glimpse behind the curtain.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Episode 19
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nuerburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Episode 21
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E103 Asian Bestsellers
programme.desc: The Lexus IS-F, Nissan's GTR and Juke R and the Infiniti FX 50 are rather exotic models. Not only the futuristic design but also the performance of these Asian power packs made European car manufacturers quiver in their boots.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E141 Jaguar RS
programme.desc: Jaguar succeeded in finding new confidence and challenging their competitors with models like the XF-RS, XK-RS and F-Type. We took a look at the iconic British brand's latest developments.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Ford Mustang vs Chevy Corvette
programme.desc: Car lovers from the Middle East present their vehicles at the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. There is a weekend at the hotel to be won. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette are up for judging this time.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Episode 22
programme.desc: At the Nuerburgring Patrick chased a 12-cylinder Aston Martin Zagato down the track. Also on the show: a Hummer, a Renault Clio and a Frenchman in a Ferrari.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Episode 20
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 V8 Bangers
programme.desc: The V8 engine: strong, bursting with power and blessed with a sound that gives you goose bumps. The British TVR 5000's engine comes from the Ford Mustang, and the car's overall low weight promises an exhilarating driving experience.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 AMC Cobra Pacer
programme.desc: The rare AMC Pacer featured in the movie Wayne's World is a real eye catcher. This car caught the attention of famous German music manager Andreas Laesker.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E54 Hybrids
programme.desc: Some people claim that hybrid cars are neither fish nor fowl. Audi's reaction was the A3 e-tron. The all-electric BMW i3 went a step further, offering a range extender. Also: the Mitsubishi Outlander, the first plug-in hybrid SUV in the world.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Best-selling sporty Coupés
programme.desc: Coupes are still bestsellers. In the Audi RS7 the Mercedes CLS 63 AMG and BMW M6 Gran Coupe got a new challenger. In addition: is the BMW 4 Series Coupe a spin-off of the successful 3 Series model? And: the rather unusual Hyundai Veloster.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Rally Year 1972 - A Ford success story
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which was run from 1970 to 1972. Car manufacturers such as Porsche, Renault, Opel and Ford took part in this competition, with Ford having an exceptionally successful year in 1972.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 German Touring Car Championship 1992
programme.desc: The Deutsche Tourenwagen Meisterschaft was one of the most important racing series in German motorsports. It was difficult, tough and well-known for its die-hard battles between the international competitors. We present the highlights of the 1992 race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Bizzarrini 5300 GT
programme.desc: Giotto Bizzarrini was the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, but after arguments with his employer he left Ferrari early. To get back at Ferrari, Bizzarrini decided to create his own sports car: the Bizzarrini GT 5300.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E58 Luxurious coupes with 12 cylinders
programme.desc: The 1973 Jaguar XJC's V12 engine purrs like a kitten and growls like a wild cat. In addition: the high-tech luxury coupe BMW 850. And: in the 1960s the Ferrari 250 GTE wrote racing history. We took this sportster to the test track.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 German Rallye Championship 1983
programme.desc: Since its premiere in 1970 the Deutsche Rallye Meisterschaft has been one of the most popular motorsports series. In the 1983 competition Opel's Manta, Kadett and Ascona sports models celebrated exceptional successes.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Audi Quattro - The new Dimension, 1985
programme.desc: In 1985 Audi made their impressive mark in motorsports with the Quattro. With its 4x4 drive this model impressed the audience and shocked the competition alike and ushered in a new era in rally sports.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Henry Ford
programme.desc: In the early 20th century, automotive pioneer Henry Ford revolutionized the world of car manufacturing with the foundation of the Ford Motor Company and his introduction of the assembly line technique in his factory and the iconic Model T.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Rally Sport 1983
programme.desc: In 1983 Audi introduced the Quattro 4x4 drive to the rally world, adding a new dimension to rally racing. The races became tougher and more brutal. The strain on drivers, vehicles and mechanics alike was extremely intense.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Rallye Sport 1984
programme.desc: In Europe and Africa in 1984, the rally veterans and drifting artists, Hannu Mikkola, Walter Roehrl, Bjoern Waldegaard, Marku Alen and the rally amazon, Michele Mouton, fought fiercly for the World Championship title.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 50 Years Jaguar E-Type
programme.desc: A legend celebrates its 50th anniversary. In 1961 the Jaguar E-Type was shown for the first time at the Geneva International Motor Show.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Mercedes 300 SL Gullwing
programme.desc: The Mercedes 300SL might be the most exciting sports car of the post-war era. It was even named sports car of the century. Hans Kleissl owns one of the world's leading repair and restoration shops for SL models.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 MG TC
programme.desc: The MG TC is a sporty, but also extremely spartan car with technology from the late 1940s. We accompanied the owner of a MG TC on his way to pass the TÜV, the German technical certification test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Melkus RS 1000
programme.desc: The Melkus RS 1000 is considered the Ferrari of the East. The extremely flat two-seater with its mid-engine and gullwing doors was the only real sports car ever built in the GDR and is hardly known outside the former country's borders.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Fiat Dino
programme.desc: The Fiat Dino Spider is one of the most beautiful cabriolets of the 1960s. Its impeccable design was created by Pininfarina, and only 525 units were built. Under its hood growls a Ferrari V6 engine.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Bizzarrini 5300 GT
programme.desc: Giotto Bizzarrini was the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, but after arguments with his employer he left Ferrari early. To get back at Ferrari, Bizzarrini decided to create his own sports car: the Bizzarrini GT 5300.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E60 French Classics
programme.desc: French manufacturers have also built milestones in automotive history in the past, including lesser-known brands such as Delage and Talbot, but also vehicles from Peugeot, Renault and Citroen.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E37 Offroad for Everybody
programme.desc: Opel's Insignia Tourer Country was the German brand's first family car in outdoor attire. In addition: with the Capture Renault presented their first compact SUV. And: what happens when Fiat's cute compact 500 is inflated to the 500L Trekking?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E51 Open Air Concert
programme.desc: As an homage to driving top-down we took a look at three of the most beautiful convertibles. The animalistic sound of the Audi S3 convertible's 4-cylinder is astonishing. But what about the Nissan 370 Z Roadster? Or Porsche's Boxster GTS?

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E104 Lamborghini
programme.desc: Sant'Agata Bolognese, the home of the iconic Italian sports car manufacturer Lamborghini, is the perfect place to take a look under the hood of the different Gallardo models. Also: cruising through Rome in an Aventador LP700-4.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E94 Audi at Le Mans
programme.desc: At the 2012 Le Mans 24 Hours, Audi entered the R18 e-tron quattro for the first time. Also: the Porsche Cayenne GTS, the model between the S and the Turbo. And: the Mercedes-Benz CLS Shooting Brake.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Episode 17
programme.desc: The RCN Challenge is the ultimate BMW driving experience. We also paid a visit to the Devils Diner, the track's indoor meeting place for drivers.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Episode 18
programme.desc: After the 24-hour race was over we left the Nuerburgring and moved to Büren, Germany, where the Raeder Motorsport company is based. They are famous for front-wheel drives with a great performance that put a lot of horsepower to the track.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Remote Control
programme.desc: Stuntman Tobi operates an Artega GT at full speed via remote control. This is just a warm-up before the big stunt, in which he drives a car up a steep ramp at 68 mph. The question is: How high can remote-controlled cars fly?

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E31 Stunt Highlights
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Christoph looks back at the stunts of the last twelve shows and explains why a stunt sometimes works better in a test than on the film set. It's a summary of all the stunts of season 2, in addition to the best outtakes.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nova SS vs Honda Accord
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Lamborghini Aventador vs GMC Chevrolet
programme.desc: The "Walk" at JBR in Dubai is the venue for our competition, as far as fancy and luxurious cars from all over the Middle East are concerned. This time, a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet are among the participants.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E156 Sports SUVs
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E152 La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E31 Women and their Classic Cars
programme.desc: A small group of car enthusiastic ladies offers resistance in the otherwise man dominated classic car world. One of them is Johanna. The 24-year-old loves her 1969 Corvette more than everything.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Scrapyard Gold
programme.desc: It is not too unusual to find hidden gems of automotive history in a perfect condition in barns or scrap yards. Also: the MGC GT Sebring, that was built for the 12 Hours of Sebring race.

programme.title: FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50 | Dating vs. Weddings
programme.desc: Get in the ring, we’re taking a look at what phase of the relationship fails harder the dates or the weddings.

programme.title: FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50 | Dog vs. Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: We pit the entire animal kingdom against man's best friend to see who our reigning fail champion will be!

programme.title: FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50 | Superheroes vs. Spells
programme.desc: Find out which of these legendary categories is more failure prone: mighty superheroes or mysterious spells.

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.sub-title: S06 : E07 FailFactory | Oops!... I Did It Again
programme.desc: The writing on the wall must have been in another language.

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.sub-title: S06 : E09 FailFactory | Surfs Down Bro
programme.desc: A bad day on the water is better than a good day at work.

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.sub-title: S06 : E11 FailFactory | Failcation
programme.desc: What happens on vacation, stays on vacation. Unless someone caught it on camera and sent it to us.

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.sub-title: S06 : E13 FailFactory | Roll the Dice
programme.desc: A mashup of random fails... just for the fun of it.

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.sub-title: S07 : E02 FailFactory | WildLife
programme.desc: These animals can't be tamed.

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.sub-title: S07 : E04 FailFactory | Spin the Wheel
programme.desc: There's no rhyme or reason to the order of these fails.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Fails
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Around the World in 80 Fails | Love, Tech, and Wild Disconnects

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E16 AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX
programme.desc: 45,000+ are on-hand for Stadium Championship Series Blue in the home of the Dallas Cowboys, AT&T Stadium. Drivers and trucks include: Ryan Anderson in Son-uva Digger, Bari Musawwir in Zombie, Cynthia Gauthier in Lucas Stabilizer, Tyler Menninga in Grave Digger, Cory Rummell in Megalodon, Jim Koehler in Avenger, John Gordon in Bad Company, Ryan Disharoon in Shaker, Charlie Pauken in El Toro Loco, Joe Foley in Axe, Chris Koehler in Monster Mutt, and Colt Stephens in ThunderROARus.

programme.sub-title: S2023 : E08 Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

While Megalodon’s Todd LeDuc attempts to win his second straight Overall Event Championship.

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA
programme.desc: High-speed brackets and split-second decisions define this Monster Jam Fast Track showdown as elite drivers push their trucks to the limit in racing and skills competition. Tyler Menninga’s Grave Digger sets the tone early, but relentless pressure from Zombie, El Toro Loco, Megalodon, and Vendetta turns every run into a must-win moment. Clean launches, aggressive cornering, and costly mistakes reshape the leaderboard as rivals trade momentum. With points on the line and no room for error, this episode delivers pure Monster Jam intensity from start to finish.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Horizon Coliseum - Greensboro NC
programme.desc: The Monster Jam action intensifies as elite drivers push their trucks to the edge in a high-energy showdown packed with momentum swings and jaw-dropping saves. Racing, skills, and freestyle runs collide as rivalries heat up and the leaderboard stays in constant motion, with massive air, hard landings, and razor-thin margins separating the field. From aggressive charges out of the gate to freestyle moments that bring the crowd to its feet, every run carries championship implications. With no room for mistakes, this episode delivers nonstop Monster Jam spectacle and sets the tone for an unforgettable stretch of competition.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2024 : E19 EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL
programme.desc: Stadium Championship Series East ends its Florida run on a mud filled track in Jacksonville. Tyler Menninga looks to mudslide the momentum from a perfect event in Orlando while Blake Granger rides his International Series success back home in the states as he pilots Max-D.

Those questions and more are answered as Monster Jam returns to San Diego, California for Round 2.

programme.sub-title: S2024 : E12 Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Former Rookie of the Year, Nick Pagliarulo returns to Kraken for his series premiere as Stadium Championship Series East heads to Tampa.

programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E08 Intrust Bank Arena - Wichita, KS
programme.desc: Earth Shaker’s Tristan England leads Arena Championship Series Central into Wichita, Kansas. The question at hand, can El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez once again climb to the top of the points standings? Will Krysten Anderson lead Grave Digger back to victory? Those questions will be answered when Monster Jam kicks off at Intrust Bank Arena.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2024 : E01 Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA
programme.desc: Monster Jam kicks off the 2024 season with the Superstar Challenge in Anaheim, California. Sixteen of the sport’s biggest stars compete on two teams through three competitions. Krysten Anderson looks to lead Team Neon to victory against Bari Musawwir’s Team Nitro. Who will be named the Most Valuable Driver? Find out when Monster Jam brings this exciting team format to Angel Stadium.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Horizon Coliseum - Greensboro NC
programme.desc: The Monster Jam action intensifies as elite drivers push their trucks to the edge in a high-energy showdown packed with momentum swings and jaw-dropping saves. Racing, skills, and freestyle runs collide as rivalries heat up and the leaderboard stays in constant motion, with massive air, hard landings, and razor-thin margins separating the field. From aggressive charges out of the gate to freestyle moments that bring the crowd to its feet, every run carries championship implications. With no room for mistakes, this episode delivers nonstop Monster Jam spectacle and sets the tone for an unforgettable stretch of competition.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Golden One Center - Sacramento, CA
programme.desc: Experience the raw power of the Arena Championship Series West as Monster Jam Replay takes over the Golden One Center in Sacramento, California. Round 4 features high-stakes action starting with JCB Racing, where Armando Castro and El Toro Loco battle through the bracket to defeat Carson Williams in Thunderoarus for the racing title. The excitement continues with the Great Clips Skills Challenge, featuring technical maneuvers and two-wheel stunts. The night reaches its peak during Freestyle, where Blake Granger and Monster Mutt Dalmatian deliver a spectacular performance, including a signature backflip, to sweep the competition. After a fierce battle against top competitors like Matt Cody...

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Angel Stadium, Anaheim, CA
programme.desc: Round four of Monster Jam Fast Track storms into Angels Stadium in Anaheim, delivering the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series West. The stadium roars as elite drivers face off in high-stakes JCB Racing, technical Great Clips Skills challenges, and a gravity-defying Freestyle finale. Tension peaks during legendary head-to-head battles, including a fierce clash between rivals Grave Digger and Megalodon, as competitors push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit. With horsepower measured in the thousands and emotions pushed to the edge, this event is a masterclass in precision and mechanical mayhem.

programme.sub-title: S2026 : E04 LIVE: Monster Jam from New Orleans, LA - 2/28/2026

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Fiserv Forum, Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Monster Jam storms into the Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee for an adrenaline-fueled stop on the Freestyle Media Championship Series. The night features a high-stakes lineup of JCB Racing, the technical Two Wheel Skills Challenge, and the fan-favorite Freestyle competition where drivers have 75 seconds to push their machines to the limit. Rivalries ignite as four-time champion Weston Anderson and 2025 Entertainer of the Year Fernando Martinez battle for dominance, while local heroes like Brandon and Mikayla Tulachka look to claim victory in front of their hometown crowd. From precision nose wheelies to gravity-defying backflips, this episode captures every heart-pounding moment as eight elite...

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2015 : E08 AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX
programme.desc: All the Racing and Freestyle action from AT&T Stadium on February 19, 2015.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2000 : E16 Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle
programme.desc: Who will it be that steps up to the plate? Freestyle galore from the Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2012 : E08 Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Racing

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2017 : E03 Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

programme.title: Monster Jam TV
programme.sub-title: S2013 : E10 Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA
programme.desc: Hold on tight while witnessing the fun at Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA during Monster Jam's 2013 season!

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2024 : E06 NRG Stadium - Houston, TX
programme.desc: Monster Jam Stadium Championship Series East drives into the Rodeo Capital. Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga holds the series points lead and looks for his third consecutive event win as Tom Meents returns to the stadium where he debuted Maximum Destruction 20 years ago.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2024 : E05 Alamodome - San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Stadium Championship Series East returns to the dome as Tyler Menninga attempts to lead Grave Digger to back-to-back event championships. Tom Meents wants to double down in freestyle and Tristan England looking for a win for his new JCB Digatron.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2011 : E03 Paul Brown Stadium - Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Buckle in for racing and freestyle fun from Paul Brown Stadium, on July 10, 2010.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2015 : E06 Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA - Racing
programme.desc: Watch all your favorite Monster Jam trucks and drivers race at Angel Stadium on February 12, 2015.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.sub-title: S2014 : E15 Cowboys Stadium - Arlington, TX - Racing
programme.desc: Don't miss the LIVE racing action from AT&T Stadium on February 28, 2014.

programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.sub-title: S2023 : E17 Ford Center - Evansville, IN
programme.desc: Arena Championship Series Central takes moves into the Ford Center in downtown Evansville, Indiana for the series finale featuring the return of Monster Jam legend, Jon Zimmer Sr. in Wild Side. Grave Digger’s Brandon Vinson looks to end the season with another championship before competing at World Finals XXII in Nashville.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: In the mind-bending season finale, the team arrives in Washington, D.C. and the secret of Warren's dreams is revealed.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: In the outpost Altura, 10K searches for Red, Warren discovers George is an old friend, Murphy encounters Sun Mei in her new lab and Doc runs into Citizen Z.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Z Nation
programme.desc: Panic and anti-talker sentiments flare after an explosion derails the vote - and rumors blame a talker. 10K, Sarge and Red are attacked by old-school zombies and suffer devastating losses, and Murphy finds his loyal blends are still out there.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: 10K and Red attend a ceremony for those lost in Altura. Warren, Doc, Citizen Z and George arrive in Pacifica.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: A new spate of terrorist bombings hit Pacifica. In order to follow his vision for human-talker unity, George seeks those responsible for the attacks.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the group wind up at a wild casino and shelter for fugitive talkers run by Murphy and his blends.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group arrives at the farming outpost that produces flour for Z-bizkuits, but it is overrun by zombies, Pandora and starving talkers laying in wait to kill them.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group is reunited with old Native friends who are defending a dam that controls Newmerica's water from talkers. In order to help, Doc and Warren undertake spiritual journeys.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group discovers Altura militia forces have enslaved talkers to mine hazardous waste for Z-bizkuits.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: With help from renegade hackers, Warren and George hack Altura's defenses and discover Estes' secret plan.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren works with humans, talkers and blends to help George defeat Estes and Pandora. Newmericans can finally vote, but before Warren can relax, Cooper reappears with a shocking revelation.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: A team starts its journey transporting the only survivor of the zombie virus from New York to Los Angeles, CA.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: In need of gas, the team follows a suspicious stranger to a damaged oil refinery deep inside a New Jersey no-go zone packed with zombies.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Z Nation
programme.desc: Out to get Cassandra back, her bizarre and dangerous "family" of cannibals catches up with the team and kidnaps Addy, endangering the mission.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: A tornado forces the team to Warren's hometown, where she searches for her husband who she lost track of in the early days of the apocalypse.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: After taking refuge in a safe enclave where no weapons are allowed, the team finds itself thrust into a battle for control of the compound against a zombie-worshipping cult.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: Lost and out of water in rural Kansas, the team is on the verge of breaking up before arriving at a Wild West-style bar. Guns, liquor and a zombie-shooting contest: what could go wrong?

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: When the last surviving cosmonaut from the International Space Station crashes on Earth, Citizen Z gets a real, live buddy - but it quickly becomes clear that his new friend has a secret agenda.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: While in South Dakota, an imminent meltdown forces the team to help the locals repair a nearby nuclear power plant full of radiated zombies.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: In need of shelter and supplies, the team seeks refuge in an all-female compound where men are not allowed.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Z Nation
programme.desc: Some strangers earn their ways into the team, taking a keen interest in Murphy, but things take a deadly turn.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: A change in plans has the team re-routed to a Colorado viral lab located in a nuclear missile silo. The team searches for Dr. Merch, the developer of the experimental vaccine previously given to Murphy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: Each member of the group goes through a near-death experience while being attacked by bounty hunters. Mack is bitten after being caught in a zombie-infested stairwell.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Z Nation
programme.desc: After finally tracking down Murphy, the group comes across a caravan of survivors transporting victims of the nuclear blast to safety. Along the way, the mission is attacked by "blasters," zombies mutated by the radioactive fallout.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: On the quest for a cure for the virus, the group makes its way to the greenhouse where Batch 47 is being grown by Odegard. There, Odegard warns them about zombie-plant hybrids.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy's past comes back to haunt him when Serena tracks him down. The team stumbles upon a hidden farm.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy separates from the group out of fear that they may take the baby away - and kill her. Vasquez and Warren are injured and wind up in an abandoned hospital. 10K is forced to make a tragic decision during a conflict with Cassandra.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: Tricked into a trap by use of a fresh brain lure, Murphy is captured by a zombie fan known as The Collector.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: Near Roswell, New Mexico, the group encounters a community, led by a woman called Bernadette, which they believe is above a secret underground base that may contain useful equipment.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy, Warren, Vasquez and Addy find themselves at a casino while 10K and Doc are captured by Natives.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group becomes embroiled in corporate politics while seeking shelter at a hotel overtaken by white-collar survivors. There, Murphy is hunted.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when it's discovered that not only does Dr. Kurian's vaccine not work but everyone who was injected will come under Murphy's control after an incubation period.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Z Nation
programme.desc: The team finally arrives in California. As they near their goal, each member thinks back to where they were at the beginning of the apocalypse and what it took to get where they are today.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Z Nation
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, the team drives through the abandoned city to the coordinates of the mobile CDC lab provided by Citizen Z. There, they discover the lab isn't just a lab - it's a submarine.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: In this epic flashback movie, the gang protects the town against a new enemy known as The Man. Part 1.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: In this epic flashback movie, the gang protects the town against a new enemy known as The Man. Part 2.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: While on the road to establish his headquarters in Spokane, Murphy saves the life of a dying girl. When her parents show up and ask to be bitten too, his mission gains momentum. Meanwhile, Warren leads the new mission group to a strange town.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: As more people flock to Murphy's new cult, Dr. Merch works on a blend vaccine as well as a booster shot to slow to Murphy's descent into zombiedom.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Alone and suffering from the effects of Merch's booster, 10K barely escapes Murphy and is stalked by a blend.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: Seemingly injected with the blend vaccine, The Man attempts to kidnap Murphy but underestimates the strength of Murphy's followers. However, he does manage to learn about Lucy's existence. 10K reunites with the group.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: Looking for Lucy, Doc and Addy run into Skeezy and Sketch, who is running for "President of the Apocalypse."

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the others inspect Murphytown and realize they are going to need a bigger army to extract Murphy. Warren finds an old ally in El Escorpion.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: Upon finding Lucy, Doc and Addy work hard to stay alive and earn the family's trust. After a dangerous game of zombie hide-and-seek, an apocalyptic fairytale and a close call with an ender, Addy and Doc convince the family to follow them to Murphy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren leads an attack against Murphytown to extract its smug leader.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E14 Z Nation
programme.desc: Addy is being pummeled with whatever The Man can throw at her - and Lucy does the same right back.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S03 : E15 Z Nation
programme.desc: Addy and Doc catch up with Warren, but the reunion is short-lived as the group faces the biggest battle yet.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: Two years later, things have gotten worse: Warren's apocalyptic dreams continue while the group fights MAD-Zs.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: Driven by her dream of a black rainbow and flesh-eating rain, Warren and Murphy escape Zona, while Doc, 10K and Sarge are pinned down by snipers.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: Following Warren's dream, the team doesn't stop while crossing the Great Pile, a seemingly endless landscape of rubble and destruction.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: The team is captured and enslaved in an elaborate underground facility, forced by their mysterious captors to perform a series of bizarre and dangerous tasks.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Lucy fights to save Murphy's life, while Warren and the others battle a biologically modified zombie.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: Shaken by the death a groupmate, something snaps in Murphy. Warren is unable to stop him and the others from committing an atrocity as misplaced revenge.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group explores an abandoned TV station while seeking a way to contact Kaya, who is attempting to hide from an invasion of Zona forces at camp Northern Light. Citizen Z returns home after two years.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: In Chicago, Doc and Murphy encounter a mysterious - and murderous - group, including Sketchy and Skeezy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group returns to Mercy Labs, where they first met The Man, to retrieve another item from Warren's dreams.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S04 : E12 Z Nation
programme.desc: At Mount Weather, the group learns the thumb print of the president is necessary to achieve Warren's goal.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Z Nation
programme.desc: Following the drone crash, Warren is nursed back to health by attractive homesteader Cooper. Meanwhile, the others finally reach Newmerica, and Murphy goes his own way.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Z Nation
programme.desc: In the outpost Altura, 10K searches for Red, Warren discovers George is an old friend, Murphy encounters Sun Mei in her new lab and Doc runs into Citizen Z.

programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Z Nation
programme.desc: Panic and anti-talker sentiments flare after an explosion derails the vote - and rumors blame a talker. 10K, Sarge and Red are attacked by old-school zombies and suffer devastating losses, and Murphy finds his loyal blends are still out there.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: 10K and Red attend a ceremony for those lost in Altura. Warren, Doc, Citizen Z and George arrive in Pacifica.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the group wind up at a wild casino and shelter for fugitive talkers run by Murphy and his blends.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc breaks out special medicine to treat George's injury and explains the Founding Fathers, the Bill of Rights and more.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group arrives at the farming outpost that produces flour for Z-bizkuits, but it is overrun by zombies, Pandora and starving talkers laying in wait to kill them.
